seo.title: Unlock PDF - Remove PDF opening restrictions with a password
seo.description: When you have permission and the password, try to read a protected PDF in your browser and create an unlocked copy.

lead: When you have permission and the password, try to remove PDF opening restrictions.

strings.heroLead: Use this only when you are allowed to handle the file and know the password. Some strongly encrypted PDFs may not work in the browser.
strings.dropLead: Drop a PDF here, or choose a local file with the button.
strings.emptyList: File information will appear here after you choose a PDF.
strings.largeFileTip: Large encrypted PDFs may need more memory.
strings.passwordPlaceholder: Enter the password you are allowed to use
strings.resultLead: The unlocked copy will appear here.
